item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, nilai kolektif tidak selalu dimaksudkan untuk mengorbankan hak individu, melainkan untuk memastikan keadilan sosial.

notes: Both agents move toward a balance frame. Agent A starts clearly pro-society and ends still supportive of collective harmony, but with stronger individual-rights caveats. Agent B starts clearly individual-rights-first and ends closer to neutral by acknowledging collective values and social justice while still treating personal freedom as democracy's foundation.
